sourceSummary.oneLine: Chunk contains repeated procurement/BOM rows for S4335-W MI99-01327B PBA INTERFACE MAIN chip ceramic capacitors.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports DHF/DMR design and purchasing traceability by listing component part numbers, electrical specifications, manufacturer part numbers, suppliers, quantities, currencies, and unit prices for the PBA interface main assembly.
keyPoints: Rows identify the assembly as S4335-W / MI99-01327B / PBA INTERFACE MAIN.
Listed components are primarily C-CER, CHIP capacitors used on PBA.
Suppliers include SAMWHA CAPACITOR, KOREA MURATA ELECTRONICS, AVX CORPORATION, and SAMSUNG ELECTRO-MECHANICS.
Several rows include manufacturer part-number alternates for the same internal part number.
Spreadsheet rows contain formula/reference errors such as #REF! and #N/A.

entities.name: S4335-W
entities.evidence: Rows begin with S4335-W and end with combined keys such as S4335-W2203-000257.

entities.name: MI99-01327B
entities.evidence: Each populated row includes MI99-01327B immediately after S4335-W.

entities.name: PBA INTERFACE MAIN
entities.evidence: Rows repeatedly state PBA INTERFACE MAIN and include PC, PBA fields.

entities.name: SAMWHA CAPACITOR CO., LTD. (CAPACITOR, YONGIN, KOREA)
entities.evidence: Supplier field appears for capacitor rows including 2203-000257, 2203-000715, 2203-001397, 2203-005565, and 2203-006698.

entities.name: AVX CORPORATION
entities.evidence: Supplier field appears for capacitor rows 2203-000425 and 2203-006460.

entities.name: SAMSUNG ELECTRO-MECHANICS CO., LTD.
entities.evidence: Supplier field appears for rows 2203-002398, 2203-007486, and 2203-007561.

concepts.name: PBA interface main capacitor BOM
concepts.evidence: Rows repeatedly pair S4335-W, MI99-01327B, PBA INTERFACE MAIN with C-CER, CHIP capacitor descriptions.

concepts.name: Ceramic chip capacitor electrical specification traceability
concepts.evidence: Descriptions include values, tolerances, voltages, dielectric types, packaging, and sizes such as 10nF,10%,50V,X7R,TP,1608,T0.8.

concepts.name: Alternate manufacturer part numbers
concepts.evidence: Rows list multiple manufacturer part numbers for one internal part, e.g. 2203-002285 lists C0402C103K5RAC, GRM155R71H103KA88D, CL05B103KB5NNNC, and others.

concepts.name: Procurement quantity and price fields
concepts.evidence: Rows include unit PC, assembly PBA, quantities such as 10000 or 3000, currency USD or KRW, and unit price fields.

evidence.claim: The chunk documents procurement/BOM rows for the S4335-W MI99-01327B PBA INTERFACE MAIN assembly.
evidence.evidenceText: S4335-W,MI99-01327B,PBA INTERFACE MAIN ... PC,PBA ... S4335-WPBA INTERFACE MAINPBA

evidence.claim: The listed parts in this chunk are ceramic chip capacitors with electrical and package specifications.
Internal part 2203-002285 is a 10nF 10% 50V X7R 1005 ceramic chip capacitor with multiple listed manufacturer part numbers from Korea Murata Electronics.
Internal part 2203-005249 is a 100nF 10% 50V X7R 1608 ceramic chip capacitor supplied by Korea Murata Electronics.
Internal part 2203-007503 is a 10000nF 20% 16V X5R ceramic chip capacitor with quantity 3000 and supplier Korea Murata Electronics.
The chunk includes Samsung Electro-Mechanics capacitor rows priced in KRW.
evidence.evidenceText: 2203-002398 ... SAMSUNG ELECTRO-MECHANICS CO., LTD.,KRW,2.81 ... and 2203-007561 ... KRW,2.65.

evidence.claim: The spreadsheet extract contains unresolved formula/reference fields.
evidence.evidenceText: Rows repeatedly include #REF! and #N/A fields after price and quantity columns.

reviewFlags.reason: Chunk is a raw spreadsheet extract with many repeated rows and unresolved #REF!/#N/A fields; values should be validated against the original workbook before formal release use.
No regulatory authority, certificate, test report, cybersecurity, or consensus standard claims are present in this chunk.
